title: Relics of the Past
description: Relics of the past is a mod that adds various mobs, items and weapons from the ancient past, according to my viewpoint of the MC timeline. It also has a few tidbits from random ideas that I had.
body:
# Description
Relics of the past is a small mod that adds various things that hint at the existence of an ancient world! Find the altars found around the dimensions and trade them for emeralds with an archeologist! Remember to use a charmed glove though!

Have a good one!

## Credits
Music made by @AAAlex on Discord (honestly, it couldn't be in better hands)

Everything else by me

Any suggestions or bug reports can be spoken in the discord ;3
